en-US.name: Cheeseburguer
en-US.description: Beef patty, melted cheese, pickles, onions, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted bun.

pt-BR.name: Cheeseburguer
pt-BR.description: Carne bovina, queijo derretido, picles, cebola, ketchup e mostarda no pão tostado.

en-US.name: Cheeseburguer bacon
en-US.description: Our classic cheeseburguer with crispy bacon and creamy mayo on a toasted bun.

pt-BR.name: Cheeseburguer bacon
pt-BR.description: Nosso cheeseburguer clássico com bacon crocante e maionese cremosa no pão tostado.

en-US.name: Avocado Burguer
en-US.description: Fresh avocado spread, beef patty, lettuce, tomato, and a tangy lime aioli on a brioche bun.

pt-BR.name: Avocado Burguer
pt-BR.description: Creme de avocado, carne bovina, alface, tomate e aioli de limão no pão brioche.

en-US.name: BT Special
en-US.description: Cheeseburguer topped with a fried egg and our signature gochujang sauce - bold heat that builds.

pt-BR.name: BT Special
pt-BR.description: Cheeseburguer com ovo frito e nosso molho gochujang especial - picância marcante.

en-US.name: Pack of tenders
en-US.description: Six golden chicken tenders with your choice of dipping sauce.

pt-BR.name: Pack of tenders
pt-BR.description: Seis tenders de frango dourados com molho de sua escolha.

en-US.name: Spicy pack of tenders
en-US.description: Six spicy breaded chicken tenders with heat that builds, dip included.

pt-BR.name: Spicy pack of tenders
pt-BR.description: Seis tenders de frango empanados e picantes, com molho para acompanhar.

en-US.name: Chicken Tenders + Cheeseburguer
en-US.description: Four golden tenders and a classic cheeseburguer - the best of both worlds, served together.

pt-BR.name: Chicken Tenders + Cheeseburguer
pt-BR.description: Quatro tenders dourados e um cheeseburguer clássico - o melhor dos dois mundos.

en-US.name: Cheeseburguer Bacon + Plain Fries
en-US.description: Our crispy-bacon cheeseburguer paired with a generous serving of our golden plain fries.

pt-BR.name: Cheeseburguer Bacon + Plain Fries
pt-BR.description: Cheeseburguer com bacon crocante acompanhado de uma porção generosa de batatas.

en-US.name: Spicy Tenders + Chocolate Milkshake
en-US.description: Six fiery spicy tenders balanced with a thick, creamy chocolate milkshake. Fire meets chill.

pt-BR.name: Spicy Tenders + Chocolate Milkshake
pt-BR.description: Seis tenders picantes equilibrados com um milkshake de chocolate cremoso.

en-US.name: Tenders + Drink
en-US.description: Six golden tenders with any fountain drink of your choice. Simple, satisfying, every time.

pt-BR.name: Tenders + Drink
pt-BR.description: Seis tenders dourados com uma bebida de sua escolha. Simples e certeiro.

en-US.name: Doctor BT
en-US.description: Our house Coke-based specialty soda with a secret twist. Refreshing, sweet, and totally addictive.

pt-BR.name: Doctor BT
pt-BR.description: Refrigerante especial da casa à base de cola, com um toque secreto.

en-US.name: Guaraná
en-US.description: Classic Brazilian guarana soda - lightly sweet, fruity, and perfectly fizzy. A taste of Brazil.

pt-BR.name: Guaraná
pt-BR.description: Guaraná brasileiro clássico - levemente doce, frutado e bem gaseificado.

en-US.name: Plain BT French Fries
en-US.description: Crispy golden fries, lightly salted. Classic and always the right call.

pt-BR.name: Plain BT French Fries
pt-BR.description: Batatas douradas e crocantes, levemente salgadas. Clássicas e certeiras.

en-US.name: BT Fries — Lemon Pepper
en-US.description: Golden fries tossed in a bright lemon-pepper seasoning. Zesty, savory, impossible to stop eating.

pt-BR.name: BT Fries — Lemon Pepper
pt-BR.description: Batatas douradas com tempero lemon pepper. Cítricas, salgadas e viciantes.

en-US.name: Chocolate Milkshake
en-US.description: Thick and creamy hand-spun chocolate milkshake made with real cocoa. Served ice cold.

pt-BR.name: Chocolate Milkshake
pt-BR.description: Milkshake de chocolate espesso e cremoso, feito com cacau de verdade.

en-US.name: Strawberry Milkshake
en-US.description: Hand-spun strawberry milkshake bursting with fresh berry flavor. Sweet, pink, and perfect.

pt-BR.name: Strawberry Milkshake
